## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Noboringdesign to discuss ongoing SEO efforts, content strategy, and site improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/x35u6y1wzfWyc38NopdtkXM6V35m9SKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Site indexing issues persist, but team is actively working on fixes; Google may need time to catch up](https://fathom.video/share/x35u6y1wzfWyc38NopdtkXM6V35m9SKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
  - [New feature images for blog posts will be available by end of next week](https://fathom.video/share/x35u6y1wzfWyc38NopdtkXM6V35m9SKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)
  - [Exploring options for blog post authorship to improve site authority](https://fathom.video/share/x35u6y1wzfWyc38NopdtkXM6V35m9SKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [Overall site clicks up slightly (+10) despite impression drop due to indexing issues](https://fathom.video/share/x35u6y1wzfWyc38NopdtkXM6V35m9SKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)

## Topics

### Site Indexing and Speed Improvements

  - [Team has been fixing various issues (redirects, H1 tags, site mapping)](https://fathom.video/share/x35u6y1wzfWyc38NopdtkXM6V35m9SKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [Usman given access to Google Search Console to resubmit index requests daily](https://fathom.video/share/x35u6y1wzfWyc38NopdtkXM6V35m9SKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [Site speed significantly improved after recent fixes](https://fathom.video/share/x35u6y1wzfWyc38NopdtkXM6V35m9SKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
  - [Some pages still taking 10+ seconds to load; being addressed](https://fathom.video/share/x35u6y1wzfWyc38NopdtkXM6V35m9SKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Article schema missing on some pages, likely contributing to indexing issues](https://fathom.video/share/x35u6y1wzfWyc38NopdtkXM6V35m9SKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)

### New Blog Feature Images

  - [New set of feature images completed and scheduled for implementation next week](https://fathom.video/share/x35u6y1wzfWyc38NopdtkXM6V35m9SKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)
  - [Will improve visual variety, especially when viewing posts by category](https://fathom.video/share/x35u6y1wzfWyc38NopdtkXM6V35m9SKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)

### Blog Post Authorship Strategy

  - [Currently all posts under "team" byline](https://fathom.video/share/x35u6y1wzfWyc38NopdtkXM6V35m9SKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
  - [Discussing options to use real team member names (e.g., Janya, Juan, Mauricio) or create AI-generated personas](https://fathom.video/share/x35u6y1wzfWyc38NopdtkXM6V35m9SKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)
  - [Previously created "Alec" persona with LinkedIn profile for Mattermade blog](https://fathom.video/share/x35u6y1wzfWyc38NopdtkXM6V35m9SKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
  - [Potential mix of 2 fake personas + 3 real team members](https://fathom.video/share/x35u6y1wzfWyc38NopdtkXM6V35m9SKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)

### Social Media and Content Distribution

  - [Social media strategy in development with Nick](https://fathom.video/share/x35u6y1wzfWyc38NopdtkXM6V35m9SKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)
  - [Plan includes reposting blog content across platforms](https://fathom.video/share/x35u6y1wzfWyc38NopdtkXM6V35m9SKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)
  - [Increased presence across web/social helps with authority and LLM brand recognition](https://fathom.video/share/x35u6y1wzfWyc38NopdtkXM6V35m9SKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)

### SEO Performance Metrics

  - [Overall site clicks up slightly (+10) despite impression drop](https://fathom.video/share/x35u6y1wzfWyc38NopdtkXM6V35m9SKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
  - [Top performing pages remain consistent (branding, fonts, typography)](https://fathom.video/share/x35u6y1wzfWyc38NopdtkXM6V35m9SKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1137.0)
  - [New tracker being implemented to automate URL updates and measure LLM performance](https://fathom.video/share/x35u6y1wzfWyc38NopdtkXM6V35m9SKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)

### Content Improvements

  - [Considering adding custom font images to popular listicle posts](https://fathom.video/share/x35u6y1wzfWyc38NopdtkXM6V35m9SKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1197.0)
  - [Team exploring workflow to generate custom font images](https://fathom.video/share/x35u6y1wzfWyc38NopdtkXM6V35m9SKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)
  - [Potential to use client work examples in blog post visuals](https://fathom.video/share/x35u6y1wzfWyc38NopdtkXM6V35m9SKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bea to follow up on new feature images implementation](https://fathom.video/share/x35u6y1wzfWyc38NopdtkXM6V35m9SKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1460.0)
  - [Bea to discuss authorship strategy with team and report back](https://fathom.video/share/x35u6y1wzfWyc38NopdtkXM6V35m9SKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1483.0)
  - [Bea meeting with Nick to finalize social media strategy](https://fathom.video/share/x35u6y1wzfWyc38NopdtkXM6V35m9SKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)
  - [Team to continue monitoring and manually requesting indexing of pages](https://fathom.video/share/x35u6y1wzfWyc38NopdtkXM6V35m9SKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
  - [Bea to consider contacting Google support if indexing issues persist](https://fathom.video/share/x35u6y1wzfWyc38NopdtkXM6V35m9SKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [GrowthX team to identify top performing posts for potential content refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/x35u6y1wzfWyc38NopdtkXM6V35m9SKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)
